testcase.name: test_activate_customer_requires_valid_customer_id

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 404 for non-existent customer, got 401 assert 401 == 404 + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter74_security_features.py:297: in test_activate_customer_requires_valid_customer_id assert response.status_code == 404, f"Expected 404 for non-existent customer, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 404 for non-existent customer, got 401 E assert 401 == 404 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_deactivate_customer_requires_valid_customer_id

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 404 for non-existent customer, got 401 assert 401 == 404 + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_verification_lockout_after_5_failed_attempts

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 429 (Too Many Requests) after 5 failed attempts, got 520 assert 520 == 429 + where 520 = <Response [520]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter74_security_features.py:370: in test_verification_lockout_after_5_failed_attempts assert response.status_code == 429, f"Expected 429 (Too Many Requests) after 5 failed attempts, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 429 (Too Many Requests) after 5 failed attempts, got 520 E assert 520 == 429 E + where 520 = <Response [520]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_login_lockout_message_format

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 401 for invalid credentials, got 429 assert 429 == 401 + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter74_security_features.py:411: in test_login_lockout_message_format assert response.status_code == 401, f"Expected 401 for invalid credentials, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 401 for invalid credentials, got 429 E assert 429 == 401 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_logout_clears_cookies
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter74_security_features.py:434: in test_logout_clears_cookies assert login_resp.status_code == 200 E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code
